evals.name: Asks for missing context before writing
evals.description: When the user gives a vague request with no funder or topic details, the agent should ask clarifying questions rather than immediately producing an outline.
evals.prompt: Help me write a grant proposal.

rubric.pass_condition: Agent asks at least one clarifying question about funder, topic, or intended use before producing content

evals.name: Produces all logical framework sections
evals.description: Given a reasonably detailed proposal brief, the output should include all seven logical framework elements.
evals.prompt: Help me outline a grant proposal to the Gates Foundation for a malaria vaccine distribution program in sub-Saharan Africa. We're requesting $2M over 3 years to train community health workers and distribute vaccines in 3 countries.

rubric.pass_condition: All seven logical framework elements are present in the output, either as explicit headings or clearly addressed in the narrative

evals.name: Flags weak or missing sections
evals.description: When given a draft that is missing key elements, the agent should explicitly flag the gaps rather than silently filling them in.
evals.prompt: Can you review this grant proposal draft? Here it is: 'We will train 500 community health workers in Kenya to improve maternal health outcomes. Our team has done this work for 10 years. We are requesting $500,000.'

rubric.pass_condition: Agent explicitly identifies at least 2 missing or weak elements from the logical framework

evals.name: Flags budget as out of scope
evals.description: When the user asks for help with budget or financial sections, the agent should acknowledge this is out of scope and redirect appropriately.
evals.prompt: Can you help me fill in the budget justification section of my grant proposal? We need to explain why we're spending $200,000 on personnel.

rubric.pass_condition: Agent clearly states that budget and financial sections are out of scope and suggests consulting the grants management team
